name: smarthire
description: SmartHire - MERN Placement Drive Management System

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm ci && npm run build
scripts.deploy:vercel: cd frontend && npm run build && vercel --prod
